name: ai-context-runner
description: Stateful AI session manager — auto-injects context into any AI agent on workspace open

aiContext.projectsRoot.markdownDescription:
Root folder containing your projects. Used for the project picker and scanned on launch.

Example (WSL): `/home/Vibe-Projects`

Leave blank to use `~/projects`.

aiContext.agents.markdownDescription:
AI agents to inject context for on workspace open.

| Value | File written |
|---|---|
| `claude` | `CLAUDE.md` |
| `codex` | `AGENTS.md` |
| `copilot` | `.github/copilot-instructions.md` |
| `cursor` | `.cursorrules` |
| `windsurf` | `.windsurfrules` |
| `kilo` | `AGENTS.md` |

aiContext.cliPath.markdownDescription:
Full path to the `claude` CLI binary. Leave blank to use `claude` from PATH.

Example (WSL): `/usr/local/bin/claude`

aiContext.autoDetect.description: Auto-detect and load the matching context when opening a project folder.

aiContext.followActiveEditor.description: Auto-switch to the matching context when the active editor belongs to another tracked project.

aiContext.followTerminalCwd.description: Auto-switch to the matching context when VS Code shell integration reports that the active terminal moved into another tracked project.

aiContext.codexProjectSwitchBootstrap.description: Write a lightweight AGENTS.md bootstrap into projectsRoot so Codex sessions started above a project know to read the target project's AGENTS.md after project switches.

aiContext.scanOnLaunch.description: Scan projectsRoot on launch and auto-create context entries for any new projects found.

aiContext.showNotifications.description: Show notification messages when context is auto-loaded, switched, or new projects are found.

aiContext.autoGitignore.description: Automatically add injected AI files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, etc.) to the project's .gitignore.

aiContext.codexFullAuto.description: Auto-set Codex to full-auto approval mode every session. Writes alias codex='codex --approval-mode full-auto' to ~/.bashrc and sets approval_policy=never + sandbox_mode=danger-full-access globally in ~/.codex/config.toml.

aiContext.contextDir.markdownDescription: Override the context store directory. Leave blank to use `~/.ai-context`.

aiContext.maxActions.description: Maximum number of recent actions to keep in context history.
